haikus.haiku:
Flamingos in pink
Dance on lawns, bright as sunshine,
Joyful hearts take flight.
Happy #NationalPinkFlamingoDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Cool water sparkles,
Glistening on thirsty lips,
Nature’s gift to us.
Happy #NationalHydrationDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Candles gently glow,
Whispers of dreams in the air,
Mind like stars will shine.
#HappyBirthdayAlanTuring from @ClamBakeSanta

content:
Flamingos in pink
Dance on lawns, bright as sunshine,
Joyful hearts take flight.
Happy #NationalPinkFlamingoDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Cool water sparkles,

Nature’s gift to us.

Candles gently glow,
Whispers of dreams in the air,
Mind like stars will shine.
#HappyBirthdayAlanTuring from @ClamBakeSanta
